name: Specialist's Array
description:
Passive: Splitshot

Ranged attacks have a %proc_chance%%% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to %count% nearby enemies with %secondary_target_range_bonus% extra range and within a %secondary_target_angle% degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct%%% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects. The primary attack deals %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct_primary_tooltip%%% damage of a normal attack.
lore: An impressive kit of trigger enhancements born in an aging assassin's idle mind.
